description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the registry.gitlab.com/pages/hugo:latest Docker image and sets GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive. Define two jobs in the default test stage: a pages job that runs the command hugo, stores the generated public/ directory as an artifact, and is limited to the master branch; and a test job that also runs hugo but is excluded from the master branch. No additional services, caches, or extra variables are required. The pages job will deploy the built site via GitLab Pages.
